dataset: SPY (SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust) daily OHLCV data

pi_items.verified_value: SPY (State Street SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust)
pi_items.source: Yahoo Finance documentation, multiple financial data sources confirm SPY is the standard ticker symbol

pi_items.metadata_value: Real daily OHLCV data for SPY (S&P 500 ETF) is available
pi_items.verified_value: Real Yahoo Finance SPY daily data from January 2023 through December 2024 (502 trading days)
pi_items.source: Environment task documentation (create_chart_layout/task.json explicitly states 'Real Yahoo Finance SPY daily data (Jan 2023 - Dec 2024, 502 trading days from Yahoo Finance)'). Confirmed in backtest_strategy_and_export/README.md and setup_ninjatrader.ps1.

pi_items.verified_value: SPY traded above 600 in late 2024; the 2023-2024 historical range includes prices well above 550, reaching approximately $697.84 in the 3-year high range
pi_items.source: Web search for SPY price history 2023-2024 confirms 52-week range of $481.80-$697.84 as of April 2025, with SPY above $600 during 2024

pi_items.verified_value: SPY historical prices during 2023-2024 were approximately $380-$600+; the 52-week low is $481.80 as of April 2025, well above 350
pi_items.source: Web search for SPY 2023-2024 price history and current 52-week ranges from Yahoo Finance, NASDAQ, and other financial sources

pi_items.verified_value: This is a NinjaTrader chart configuration parameter. The value 250 pixels is within typical NinjaTrader configuration ranges
pi_items.source: Task specification - this is a configuration value set by the user, not a data claim

pi_items.verified_value: This is a NinjaTrader chart configuration parameter described in the task as 'zoomed in'. The value 15 pixels is within typical NinjaTrader bar spacing ranges
pi_items.source: Task specification from task.json description section

pi_items.verified_value: NinjaTrader 8 supports 'Fixed' and other scaling modes for chart Y-axis scaling
pi_items.source: Task description explicitly requires setting scaling mode to 'Fixed' in step 4

pi_items.verified_value: Task requires disabling (hiding) vertical grid lines as per step 5
pi_items.source: Task description step 5: 'Disable (hide) the Vertical grid lines so only horizontal lines remain'

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real daily OHLCV data for SPY (SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust) from January 2023 through December 2024, containing 502 trading days of Yahoo Finance data. SPY is the correct ticker symbol. During this period, SPY traded in the approximate range of $380-$697, with 2024 prices reaching above $600 and a 52-week low of $481.80 (as of April 2025). The metadata scale values (350-550) represent the chart configuration the agent must set, not the actual data range; these values would be below the highest prices in the available data and form a subset viewing window for technical analysis.
